allow: Bash(python -c "from osgeo import gdal; print\(''''GDAL OK'''', gdal.__version__\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.11.37:8765/manifest.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "LAN OK: $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { "LAN ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(git log --all --diff-filter=A --name-only --format="%h" | Select-String -Pattern "config"; Write-Output '--- grep history for token ---'; git grep -l "eyJ" $\(git rev-list --all\) -- cesium_config.json 2>$null; Write-Output 'done')

PowerShell(Write-Output '=== Windows .ssh ==='; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh"\) { Get-ChildItem -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh" | Select-Object Name, Length } else { Write-Output 'no .ssh dir' }; Write-Output '=== WSL .ssh ==='; wsl -d Ubuntu -e ls -la /home/armander/.ssh)
PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -e sh -c "ls -la ~/.ssh 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; cat ~/.ssh/config 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; whoami")
